title: Gex: Enter the Gecko Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Crystal Dynamics' TV-parody platformer sends Gex through channel-surfing media worlds with tail whip combat.
narrative.core_loop: Tail-whip through TV parody worlds, collect remotes, and defeat Rez across channel hubs.

mechanics.map_notes: Core spin attack combat defines Gex: Enter the Gecko stage design.
